title: LogisticRegression base learner fails to converge at max_iter=500 (lbfgs ConvergenceWarning) on tier2 features
why: During the B0064 re-anchor run, the lr base learner (B0053) emits lbfgs ConvergenceWarning at the max_iter=500 end of HP_SPACES["lr"] on the high-dimensional tier2 feature space. Non-converged lr fits produce unstable coefficients -> noisy OOF -> the lr column in the stack is partly garbage. Either scale features before lr, raise max_iter floor (drop 500, keep 1000+), or document lr as best-effort. Low value (lr is a diversity base, not the headline model) but worth tidying.
value_rationale: Cleaner lr fits improve the stacking-gate diversity signal lr was added for (B0053).
recommendation: Drop max_iter=500 from the lr grid (keep 1000); cheapest fix.
